column1: #SCHEMA_VERSION=5.3
# SCHEMA v5.2 (2026-04-16) — Added 3 trailing columns: Style
#   Style  : NOM | BOLD | ITALIC | BOLDITALIC               (default per tier: T1=NOM
#   Color  : BLACK | BLUE | GREEN | RED | ORANGE | PURPLE | GREY | WHITE  (default: BLACK)
#   Size   : 2 | 2.5 | 3 | 3.5                              (default per tier: T1=2.5
# Prescribed styles for TAG7 sub-sections (A-F) per ISO 19650 presentation convention:
#   ASS_TAG_7A_TXT  Identity Header              BOLD    BLUE     (2.5)
#   ASS_TAG_7B_TXT  System & Function            ITALIC  GREEN    (2.0)
#   ASS_TAG_7C_TXT  Spatial Context              NOM     ORANGE   (2.0)
#   ASS_TAG_7D_TXT  Lifecycle & Status           NOM     RED      (2.0)
#   ASS_TAG_7E_TXT  Technical Specs              BOLD    PURPLE   (2.0)
#   ASS_TAG_7F_TXT  Classification               ITALIC  GREY     (2.0)
# Tag Style Engine matrix: TAG_{SIZE}{STYLE}_{COLOR}_BOOL  (128 combos = 4 sizes x 4 styles x 8 colors).
# ApplyTagStyleCommand sets exactly one BOOL true per element type; label rows gated by that BOOL become
# visible. Blank Style/Color/Size fields in this CSV mean "inherit tier default" — values are picked up
# by TagFamilyCreatorCommand when generating the label row and by ApplyTagStyleCommand when switching.
# SCHEMA v5.3 (2026-04-22) — Paragraph tiers 1 to 10 (was 1 to 3)
#   Every STING tag family now carries TAG_PARA_STATE_1_BOOL .. TAG_PARA_STATE_10_BOOL as
#   type parameters. TagFamilyCreatorCommand injects all ten via VisibilityParams.
#   SetParagraphDepthCommand supports cumulative depths (1=T1 only
#   Each tier beyond T3 uses the same Calculated Value pattern:
#     Tier row formula template (any Tier N row):
#       if(TAG_PARA_STATE_N_BOOL
#   Recommended use of tiers 4 to 10:
#     T4 — Commissioning & handover   (COMM_* params
#     T5 — Cost & procurement         (CST_*
#     T6 — Carbon & sustainability    (CBN_A1_A3 .. CBN_C3_C4
#     T7 — Fabrication & QC           (ASS_SPOOL_*
#     T8 — Clash & coordination       (CLASH_TRIAGE_*
#     T9 — As-built & health          (ASBUILT_*
#     T10 — Compliance / audit trail  (RGL_*
# Tier column accepts: T1 | T2 | T3 | T4 | T5 | T6 | T7 | T8 | T9 | T10
# Full tag style parameter set injected into every family (TagFamilyCreatorCommand.StyleParams):
#   128 text style BOOLs           TAG_{SIZE}{STYLE}_{COLOR}_BOOL
#                                  SIZES: 2 / 2.5 / 3 / 3.5   STYLES: NOM / BOLD / ITALIC / BOLDITALIC
#                                  COLORS: BLACK BLUE GREEN RED ORANGE PURPLE GREY WHITE
#   Box colour (RGB 0-255)         TAG_BOX_COLOR_R_INT / _G_INT / _B_INT
#   Box visibility / style         TAG_BOX_VISIBLE_BOOL / TAG_BOX_STYLE_TXT  (SOLID | DASHED | NONE | ROUND)
#   Leader colour (RGB 0-255)      TAG_LEADER_COLOR_R_INT / _G_INT / _B_INT
#   Scale / depth cache            TAG_SCALE_TIER_AUTO_BOOL / TAG_DEPTH_TIER_INT
#   Warnings                       TAG_WARN_VISIBLE_BOOL / TAG_WARN_SEVERITY_FILTER_TXT
STING Tag Configuration v5.0 - STR (COMPLETE with Warnings)
